title: Super Mario Bros Server
description: Event driven server focusing on Super Mario events. Featuring custom movement mechanics, iconic power-ups, and a soon schedule on scheduled events to do!
body:
This is the modpack page for my Super Mario Bros. Minecraft project. since you have the link to this page that means you can easily access the server now!


The main goal for this server is to bring the mario movie/games as close as possible to minecraft! There are plenty of working in progress stuff but it'll be getting closer each day!<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/zAZJjM8i35I" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
